name: Paidy
description: Paidy — Japan buy-now-pay-later service allowing purchases with phone number and email, with monthly consolidated billing.

seo.title: Paidy — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Paidy: Paidy — Japan buy-now-pay-later service allowing purchases with phone number and email, with monthly consolidated billing.

when_to_use: BNPL checkout for Japanese consumers without credit card
Monthly consolidated billing for Japanese subscription goods
Offering deferred payment option at Japanese e-commerce checkout

pros: BNPL with just phone and email
cons: Consumer credit risk abstracted but fees high
Integration via PSPs, not always direct
review.verdict: Conversion booster for Japanese checkout via frictionless BNPL, but fees and single-country scope are real.
review.best_for: E-commerce selling to Japanese consumers who prefer post-pay consolidated billing
review.not_for: Merchants outside Japan or those sensitive to BNPL merchant fees

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
